title: Pentagon Releases New Batch of UFO Files Including New Mystery Orb Images, Videos
description: The Pentagon released a third batch of documents related to UFOs on Friday, which include images and videos of mysterious orbs in the sky. The post Pentagon Releases New Batch of UFO Files Including New Mystery Orb Images, Videos first appeared on Mediaite .

title: US releases 3rd batch of declassified UFO files
description: Released files include 'credible' videos that show red and yellow light-emitting orbs, moving through the sky

title: New UFO files dump reveals CIA destroyed a 'message from space': Live updates
description: The Pentagon released a third batch of UFO files that includes dozens of new documents, photographs and videos to the government's rapidly expanding archive of unexplained sightings.

title: Pentagon releases 3rd batch of UFO files: "Are you seeing this?"
description: The Pentagon on Friday released a new group of documents and videos related to UFOs, or UAPs, with 72 more documents, images and recordings.

title: Pentagon Releases New Batch of UFO Files
description: CBS News: “The Pentagon on Friday released a new group of documents and videos related to UFOs, the third release since the government began a wave of new disclosures last month.”
